## Runtime.Indexers.IngredientResolver type

Ingredient resolver function type. Provided by RuntimeContext to resolve ingredient IDs to entities.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type IngredientResolver = (id: IngredientId) => Result<IRuntimeIngredient>;
```
